stemHtml: The flight crew of an aircraft executes the pre-landing checklist, and they realise that the landing gear may not be fully extended. The crew decides to request a low pass near the tower to confirm the landing gear status. What is the correct sequence for the elements of their report?

options.a: Pan pan (x3), station being called, aircraft callsign, reason, intentions.
options.b: Pan pan (x3), aircraft callsign, station being called, reason, intentions.
options.c: Mayday (x3), station being called, reason, intentions, aircraft callsign.
options.d: Mayday (x3), station being called, aircraft callsign, reason, intentions.
